## Summary

<!-- One paragraph: what changed, why, and what problem it solves. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Mark (x) exactly one -->

- [ ] Bug fix — non-breaking change that fixes an issue
- [ ] Feature — non-breaking change that adds functionality
- [ ] Refactor — code change that neither fixes nor adds
- [ ] Performance — change that improves speed or memory
- [ ] Chore — maintenance, dependencies, tooling
- [ ] Docs — documentation only
- [ ] Breaking change — existing functionality will break

## Checklist

<!-- Confirm all before requesting review -->

- [ ] Build passes (`npm run build` in affected packages)
- [ ] Tests pass (`npm test` or equivalent)
- [ ] No new TypeScript errors (`tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] PR targets the correct branch (`develop` → `main`)
- [ ] Conventional commits used
- [ ] Self-review completed

## Changes

| File | What & Why |
|------|------------|
| `path/to/file` | Change description and motivation |
